---
include-in-header: "_includes/fontawesome-2up.html"
#title: "contact us"
listing:
  contents: contact
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  table-striped: true
  table-hover: true
  fields: [image, title, course-format]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: 
    categories: [R, Quarto]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
#knitr:
#  opts_chunk: 
#    collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---
![](images/favicon.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="logo, a simple graph resembling Edinburgh skyline" fig-align="center" width="33%"}

# [CONTACT US]{.second-color}
Get in touch with us!
